params.name: Tunnelling Shield
params.description:
On May 17, 1818 AD, French engineer Marc Brunel registered a patent for the Tunnelling Shield.
Shield tunneling technology is a fully mechanized method for tunneling. It involves supporting the pipeline and rock wall to prevent soil collapse, excavating the soil in the desired direction using cutting equipment, and removing the excavated soil outside the tunnel using mechanical equipment. The method also utilizes hydraulic jacks to push and assemble precast concrete pipe sections, enabling ef …
